What's Going On With Lear Shares Thursday?
data.description: Lear reported earnings for the 2024 third-quarter before the market opened.

data.title: Rogers Communications Q3 Earnings Beat Expectations Amid Ongoing Network Investment Plans
data.description: Rogers Communications reports Q3 earnings beat. Rogers recently entered into a non-binding term sheet with an undisclosed global financial investor which will finance a portion of its network with a structured equity investment of C$7 billion.

data.title: Why Is Gene Therapy-Focused Intellia Therapeutics Stock Trading Lower On Thursday?
data.description: Intellia Therapeutics' Phase 2 data shows NTLA-2002, a CRISPR gene therapy, reduced hereditary angioedema attack rates by up to 81%, with complete responses.

data.title: Institutional Bitcoin Investors Have Their Own Trading Strategies: Here's One
data.description: The Bitcoin (CRYPTO: BTC) market has seen a notable uptick in futures trading, with open interest reaching an all-time high (ATH) of $32.9 billion, signaling increasing leverage
